ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient (e.g., Non-Hispanic/ Latino) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient (e.g., White, African-American/ Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the patient resides */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the patient's residence */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient */,
  "language_spoken" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient (e.g., Yes, No, Former) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient (e.g., Yes, No, Former) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronic condition record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the chronic condition */,
  "chronic_condition" TEXT /* Description of the chronic condition (e.g., Yes, No, Unknown) */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Specific name of the chronic condition (e.g., Diabetes, Hypertension) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the chronic condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Current treatment status of the chronic condition (e.g., In Treatment, Remission, Not Treated) */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Brief description of the current treatment plan */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last evaluation or check-up for the chronic condition */,
  "next_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled evaluation or check-up */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chronic_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "poverty_rate" TEXT /* Poverty rate of the county */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the county */,
  "average_household_size" TEXT /* Average household size in the county */,
  "major_employment_sectors" TEXT /* Major employment sectors in the county (e.g., Healthcare, Manufacturing, Services) */,
  "healthcare_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of healthcare facilities in the county */,
  "public_transportation_access" TEXT /* Level of public transportation access in the county (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)
